title: rawOre_on_1.12.2
body:
# About this mod
![Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef7ee2c4919d7b5ff7368b6a55cd90971f42a253.png)

- This mod adds Raw_Gold and Raw_Iron from the snapshot 21w14a to Minecraft 1.12.2.
- Make ores in 1.12.2 benefit from Fortune enchantment.
- It also includes various Raw Ore and metal ingots for compatibility with other mods. 
- Besides Raw Gold and Raw Iron, other Raw Ore types require the installation of additional mods that include ores.
- This mod can be added to any modpack.

Configuration File:
- Location: config\sui_ke\rawore\rawOre.cfg;

> - The Recipes added for the crossover mod can have their values adjusted in the config file.

> - "rawOreDropAmount" setting too high may cause lag or items not to drop.

> - **If you only need Raw Gold and Raw Iron**, set the "Lite version" option to true in the configuration file.
> - Hide useless items automatically without modifying this setting.

# Notes
- Display items missing can be ignored. Because the code may change constantly.
- **Do not remove the "!" at the beginning of the mod's filename, as some features may not work or may not function correctly!**

# Bugs or Suggestions
- **Before reporting bugs, check if the mod is up to date.**
- email: mu_xun@outlook.com (Subject: Bugs/Suggestions for rawOre_on_1.12.2)
- [github](https://github.com/sui-ke/Minecraft-Mod-suikerawore/issues)

# Cross mod Integration
- [IC2: ](https://modrinth.com/mod/industrial-craft)Macerator Recipes.
- [Mekanism: ](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)Chemical Dissolution Chamber, Crusher, Chemical Injection Chamber, Enrichment Chamber, Metallurgic Infuser, Purification Chamber Recipes.
- [Ender IO: ](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderio)SAG Mill Recipes.
- [Thermal Expansion 5: ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thermal-expansion)Redstone Furnace, Magma Crucible, Pulverizer, Induction Smelter Recipes.
- [Techguns: ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techguns)Chemical Laboratory, Reaction Chamber Recipes.
- [Tinkers' Construct 2: ](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct)Raw Ore can be placed in the Smeltery for smelting.
- [Future MC: ](https://modrinth.com/mod/future-mc)Raw Ore can be used in the Blast Furnace.
- [Thaumcraft 6: ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft)Crucible Recipes that involve ores, refining enchant.
- [Dense Metals: ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dense-metals)By default, Dense Ore drops twice the amount of Raw Ore. You can change this multiplier in the mod's configuration file (Dense Ore Value).

Customized Raw_Ore:
- [Tinkers' Construct 2: ](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct)raw_ardite
- [The Aurorian: ](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-aurorian)raw_cerulean, raw_moonstone
- [The Betweenlands: ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/angry-pixel-the-betweenlands-mod)raw_octine, raw_syrmorite
- [Thaumcraft 6: ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft)raw_cinnabar；
- [Vulcanite: ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vulcanite)raw_vulcanite;
- [Into The Maelstrom: ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/into-the-maelstrom)raw_chasmium；
- [Minecraft Comes Alive: ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecraft-comes-alive-mca)raw_rosegold；
- Only when you have a mods can you have items.

# Compatibility with Other Mods
- [Vein Miner](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/veinminer)'s chain feature can cause this mod's Raw Ore to drop.
- When both this mod and [FutureDecoration](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/5890.html) are loaded simultaneously, Raw Ore will drop.
- If you are using a mod with automatic item pickup, there is a small chance that Raw Ore may not drop. If this happens, you can put it down and re-dig it.

Compatibility with Ore Dictionary for other mods:
- Various mineral ore dictionaries allow other mods' ores to drop Raw Ore;
- Ingot dictionaries used for synthesizing items in other mods.

If you are using a non-standard ore dictionary:
- Some mods may use a non-standard ore dictionary. If you encounter issues with synthesis, you can use the [CraftTweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafttweaker) mod's "/ct hand" command to check if the mod's items have an ore dictionary.
- If you encounter this issue, please send the suggestion to the email address provided.

Never compatible:
- Mod synthesis is not defined by Ore Dictionary! (If only one synthesis does not use an ore dictionary and the ore does not have an ore dictionary, it can be compatible)
